goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the 'cheap' price range.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 08:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'london kings cross' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free parking and should be in the expensive price range
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the cheap price range
Make sure you get address and area
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 08:15 and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from london kings cross and should leave on thursday
Make sure you get arrival time and price
